Title: Parliament Lifts Ban on New Nuclear Power Plants
Description: Things will be bustling again at the Federal Palace in Bern through June 19. Numerous important issues will be on the agenda during the summer session of the National Council and Council of States.

Title: Tesco moving 40,000 server workloads off VMware amid Broadcom's “abusive conduct”
Description: Tesco claimed Broadcom hiked its VMware prices by about 175 percent in UK court filings.

Title: Leaked financial docs show OpenAI is losing billions of dollars a year
Description: Audited accounting shows growing revenues being dwarfed by R&D, other expenses.
